text:
Hugo is a soldier of the Garrison.

Appearance

Hugo has dark slicked back hair. He is most often seen wearing a white long-sleeved shirt and pants.

Personality

Hugo is shown to have an attachment to alcohol, offering Hannes a drink in the middle of the day.

Story

Hugo is with his comrades drinking a bottle of alcohol when he offers Hannes a drink. Hannes refuses his offer and explains that he is cutting back on his intake, leading Hugo to question him.

Relationships

Hannes - Hannes is Hugo's comrade, with whom he appears to be in good terms.
